
Defining components in code cells:

```{python}
org.create_highchart(
    key="my-highchart",
    title="Highchart title",
    data=my_dataframe,
    xlabel="my_xlabel",
)
```

```{python}
org.configure_factbox(
    key = "my-factbox,
    title = "Factbox title",
    box_type = "default")
```

Inserting a highchart:

`{python} org.insert("my_highchart")`


Inserting a factbox:

::: `{python} org.insert_configuration("my_factbox")`

Markdown text inside the fatbox.

:::
